# iru Provider

Manage Iru (Kandji) endpoint management resources as code. Authenticates to a single tenant with a bearer API token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    iru = {
      source = "dmcphearson/iru"
    }
  }
}

provider "iru" {
  # Credentials are read from the environment by default:
  #   export IRU_API_URL="https://acme.api.kandji.io"
  #   export IRU_API_TOKEN="..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) Iru API bearer token. May also be set via the `IRU_API_TOKEN` environment variable (preferred; keep tokens out of config).
- `api_url` (String) Full tenant API URL, e.g. `https://acme.api.kandji.io`. May also be set via the `IRU_API_URL` environment variable.
